creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
pkg-install.in shows:

POST-INSTALL)
        cd %%FONTSDIR%%
        touch fonts.alias
        grep -v -- "-shinonome-" fonts.alias > fonts.alias.tmp
        (cat fonts.alias.tmp; grep -- "-shinonome-" %%FONTSALIAS%%) \
            > fonts.alias
        rm -f fonts.alias.tmp
        ;;
POST-DEINSTALL)
        cd %%FONTSDIR%%

fixed.
